title: × coeloglossorchis guilhotii
constituents: × coeloglossorchis guilhotii has many active constituents, such as alkaloids, glycosides, flavonoids, and terpenoids, which possess significant medicinal properties. These constituents, including guilhotine, guilhotinine, and coeloglossine, have been found to exhibit anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities, thereby improving symptoms of conditions like arthritis, wounds, and oxidative stress. The flavonoids present in the plant, such as kaempferol and quercetin, have been shown to have cardioprotective effects, reducing the risk of heart disease and promoting overall cardiovascular health. By harnessing the medicinal properties of × coeloglossorchis guilhotii, researchers and healthcare professionals aim to develop novel therapies that can enhance the quality of life for individuals suffering from various health conditions.
